title: Ondo Finance founder Nathan Allman dies aged 32
summary: Ondo Finance says its founder, Nathan Allman, died unexpectedly, with company president Ian De Bode to serve as CEO.

title: Kelp DAO says rsETH restored 5 weeks after $293M protocol hack
summary: Kelp DAO says that sETH mints, redemptions and rewards operations have been running smoothly since it opened withdrawals for the token earlier this month.

title: Stocks Pare Gain, Oil Climbs as US Strikes Iran: Markets Wrap
summary: Stocks trimmed gains and crude oil advanced after US strikes on sites in Iran curbed optimism over a potential deal to end the war.

title: Treasury Curve Flashes Higher-for-Longer Warning Under Warsh
summary: A key Treasury yield gap shrank to its tightest level in a year as traders ramped up bets the Federal Reserve may keep interest rates higher for longer under new chairman Kevin Warsh.

title: Famed iPhone, Sony Hacker Says AI Coding Agents Are a Disaster Waiting to Happen
summary: George Hotz spent six months testing agents on real projects and came away convinced they're creating an avalanche of undetectable slop—and that large organizations won't realize it until it's too late.

title: OKX’s X Layer launches Exchange OS, allowing users to create custom crypto markets
summary: Exchange OS moves core exchange functions, such as matching, margining, liquidation, and settlement, to the protocol layer.

title: Nathan Allman, founder and CEO of Ondo Finance, dies unexpectedly
summary: Ian De Bode, president of Ondo Finance, will assume the role of CEO, the company said in a statement on Monday.
